category_sources: Official Debian manpage says fakeroot runs commands in an environment faking root privileges for file manipulation.
source_facts.description says fakeroot provides a fake root environment.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is `fakeroot`; Debian package tracker, Salsa project, and manpage use `fakeroot`.
docs_sources: Official Debian manpage documents fakeroot behavior and options.
Official Salsa repository exposes a README for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Debian tracker links to source browsing and the Salsa Git repository for fakeroot.
tags_sources: Official manpage explains simulated root ownership/permissions for archive and Debian package creation.
source_facts.description identifies a fake root environment.
